message:
feat(distributed): add stale scope pruning integration test and listener heartbeat tracking

Add distributed_listener_prunes_stale_session_scope E2E test: connects
two sessions from the same sender, disconnects the first, advances
time past stale threshold, triggers pruning, and verifies the stale
scope is removed from the aggregator while the active scope survives.

main.rs: add heartbeat_interval_ms and last_heartbeat_at tracking to
DistributedSequenceScopeState. Wire heartbeat updates into the
distributed event stream handler. Add listener-level periodic stale
scope pruning in the accept loop with configurable prune interval.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
